title: NZ Government Cloud First Policy
description: New Zealand government policy requiring public cloud adoption for information systems unless specific criteria apply. Establishes mandatory requirements for data classification, multi-cloud strategies, risk assessment, and sustainability considerations in cloud adoption decisions.
